title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 521.370 - Proceedings where defendant is personally served or appears
text:
521.370.  Proceedings where defendant is personally served or appears. — When the defendant is summoned to appear, or shall appear voluntarily, the like proceedings shall be had between him and the plaintiff as in ordinary actions commenced by summons, and a general judgment may be rendered for or against the defendant.
(RSMo 1939 § 1477) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1313; 1919 § 1764; 1909 § 2333
